mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acd_location_address_cache (longitude, latitude, address, create_time, update_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{address}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{expireTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE acd_location_address_cache SET longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, address = #{address}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, longitude, latitude, address, create_time, update_time, expire_time FROM acd_location_address_cache WHERE expire_time >= #{currentTime} AND (longitude, latitude) IN
(#{coord.longitude}, #{coord.latitude})

SELECT id, longitude, latitude, address, create_time, update_time, expire_time FROM acd_location_address_cache WHERE (longitude, latitude) IN
(#{coord.longitude}, #{coord.latitude})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO acd_location_address_cache (longitude, latitude, address, create_time, update_time, expire_time) VALUES
(#{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.address}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.expireTime})
